mapper.sql: id, query_id, question, answer_summary, feedback_type, comment, article_keys, source_paths, reported_by, status, resolution_comment, handled_by, handled_at, created_at, updated_at, metadata_json::text as metadata_json
mapper.select: insert into pending_answer_feedback ( query_id, question, answer_summary, feedback_type, comment, article_keys, source_paths, reported_by, status, resolution_comment, handled_by, handled_at, created_at, updated_at, metadata_json ) values ( #{record.queryId}, #{record.question}, #{record.answerSummary}, #{record.feedbackType}, #{record.comment}, #{record.articleKeys,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.sourcePaths,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.reportedBy}, #{record.status}, #{record.resolutionComment}, #{record.handledBy}, #{record.handledAt}, #{record.createdAt}, #{record.updatedAt}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler} ) returning id
mapper.update: update pending_answer_feedback set status = #{status}, resolution_comment = #{resolutionComment}, handled_by = #{handledBy}, handled_at = #{handledAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from pending_answer_feedback where upper(status) = upper(#{status})
